english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Read in the Name of your Lord who created;
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

created man from a clinging mass.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Read, and your Lord is the most generous,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

who taught by the pen,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

taught man what he did not know.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Indeed man becomes rebellious
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

when he considers himself without need.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Indeed to your Lord is the return.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Tell me, he who forbids
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

a servant when he prays,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

tell me, should he be on [true] guidance,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

or bid [others] to Godwariness,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

tell me, should he call him a liar and turn away
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

—does he not know that Allah sees [him]?
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

arabic text: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًا بِالنَّاصِيَةِ
english translation text:
No indeed! If he does not cease, We shall seize him by the forelock,
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

a lying, sinful forelock!
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

Then let him call out his gang!
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

We [too] shall call the keepers of hell.
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot

No indeed! Do not obey him, but prostrate and draw near [to Allah]!
Al ‘Alaq – The Clot
WAJIB SAJADH
